Game.Name: Onizuka Katsuya Super Virtual Boxing - Shin Kentou Ou Densetsu (Japan)
Game.plot: Onizuka Katsuya Super Virtual Boxing is a Sports game, developed by Sting and published by Sofel,which was released in Japan in 1993.Cheat: Access the game ending/creditsOnce the game starts (and before the display of the Manufacturer's logo), press the following buttons at the same time.Cheat: Access the game ending/creditsGo to the "Option" mode, move the cursor to the "Sound Test", and press Select (with the controller 1) while holding LR (with the controller 2).
